titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abu Abdullah Al-Khurasani
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abu Abdullah Al-Khurasani

segments: ه عن أبي عبد اللّه الخراسانيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبي عبد اللّه الخراسانيّ‌.
arabic.text: ه عن أبي عبد اللّه الخراسانيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبي عبد اللّه الخراسانيّ‌.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Abu Abdullah Al-Khurasani, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - through Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Abu Abdullah Al-Khurasani.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Abu Abdullah Al-Khurasani, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - through Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Abu Abdullah Al-Khurasani.
